raw_sql:
SELECT
    u.name,
    u.department,
    u.start_date,
    a.purchased_on,
    a.warranty_expiration,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_asset_after_start,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
ORDER BY ABS(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))
LIMIT 20;
template:
SELECT
    u.name,
    u.department,
    u.start_date,
    a.purchased_on,
    a.warranty_expiration,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_asset_after_start,
    EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
ORDER BY ABS(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN days_diff < 0 THEN 'Before start (pre-provisioned)'
        WHEN days_diff = 0 THEN 'Same day'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 1 AND 7 THEN '1-7 days after'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 8 AND 30 THEN '8-30 days after'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN 31 AND 180 THEN '1-6 months after'
        ELSE 'More than 6 months after'
    END AS procurement_timing,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(warranty_duration_days)) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(MIN(warranty_duration_days)) AS min_warranty_days,
    ROUND(MAX(warranty_duration_days)) AS max_warranty_days
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
) sub
GROUP BY procurement_timing
ORDER BY asset_count DESC;
template:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN days_diff < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff = ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS procurement_timing,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(warranty_duration_days)) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(MIN(warranty_duration_days)) AS min_warranty_days,
    ROUND(MAX(warranty_duration_days)) AS max_warranty_days
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
) sub
GROUP BY procurement_timing
ORDER BY asset_count DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) < '0'::numeric) THEN 'Before start (pre-provisioned)'::text WHEN (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) = '0'::numeric) THEN 'Same day'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '1'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '7'::numeric)) THEN '1-7 days after'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '8'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '30'::numeric)) THEN '8-30 days after'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '31'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '180'::numeric)) THEN '1-6 months after'::text ELSE 'More than 6 months after'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -7 AND -1 THEN '1-7 days before'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -30 AND -8 THEN '8-30 days before'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -180 AND -31 THEN '1-6 months before'
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -365 AND -181 THEN '6-12 months before'
        ELSE 'More than 1 year before'
    END AS pre_provision_window,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(warranty_duration_days)) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(days_diff)) AS avg_days_before_start
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
    WHERE a.purchased_on < u.start_date
) sub
GROUP BY pre_provision_window
ORDER BY avg_days_before_start DESC;
template:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -?n AND -?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -?n AND -?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -?n AND -?n THEN ?s
        WHEN days_diff BETWEEN -?n AND -?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS pre_provision_window,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(warranty_duration_days)) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(days_diff)) AS avg_days_before_start
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)) AS warranty_duration_days
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
    WHERE a.purchased_on < u.start_date
) sub
GROUP BY pre_provision_window
ORDER BY avg_days_before_start DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '-7'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '-1'::numeric)) THEN '1-7 days before'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '-30'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '-8'::numeric)) THEN '8-30 days before'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '-180'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '-31'::numeric)) THEN '1-6 months before'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) >= '-365'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) <= '-181'::numeric)) THEN '6-12 months before'::text ELSE 'More than 1 year before'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN warranty_at_start < 0 THEN 'Expired before start'
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN 0 AND 90 THEN '0-90 days warranty at start'
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN 91 AND 180 THEN '91-180 days warranty at start'
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN 181 AND 365 THEN '6-12 months warranty at start'
        ELSE 'More than 1 year warranty at start'
    END AS warranty_coverage_at_onboarding,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(days_diff)) AS avg_days_purchased_before_start,
    a.department
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) AS warranty_at_start,
        u.department
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
) a
GROUP BY warranty_coverage_at_onboarding, department
ORDER BY department, asset_count DESC;
template:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN warranty_at_start < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN warranty_at_start BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS warranty_coverage_at_onboarding,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(days_diff)) AS avg_days_purchased_before_start,
    a.department
FROM (
    SELECT
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)) AS days_diff,
        EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) AS warranty_at_start,
        u.department
    FROM flag_18 a
    JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
) a
GROUP BY warranty_coverage_at_onboarding, department
ORDER BY department, asset_count DESC;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) < '0'::numeric) THEN 'Expired before start'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) >= '0'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) <= '90'::numeric)) THEN '0-90 days warranty at start'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) >= '91'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) <= '180'::numeric)) THEN '91-180 days warranty at start'::text WHEN ((EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) >= '181'::numeric) AND (EXTRACT(day FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) <= '365'::numeric)) THEN '6-12 months warranty at start'::text ELSE 'More than 1 year warranty at start'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
    a.model_category,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_asset_after_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_days_at_start,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_cost
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY a.model_category
ORDER BY avg_warranty_days_at_start ASC;
template:
SELECT
    a.model_category,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_asset_after_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_days_at_start,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_cost
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY a.model_category
ORDER BY avg_warranty_days_at_start ASC;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on) AS purchase_month,
    TO_CHAR(a.purchased_on, 'Mon') AS month_name,
    COUNT(*) AS assets_purchased,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_before_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_duration
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on), TO_CHAR(a.purchased_on, 'Mon')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on);
template:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on) AS purchase_month,
    TO_CHAR(a.purchased_on, ?s) AS month_name,
    COUNT(*) AS assets_purchased,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_before_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_duration
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on), TO_CHAR(a.purchased_on, ?s)
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM a.purchased_on);

raw_sql:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date) AS start_month,
    TO_CHAR(u.start_date, 'Mon') AS month_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS employees_starting,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS assets_assigned,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_purchased_vs_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_remaining_at_start
FROM flag_18_sysuser u
LEFT JOIN flag_18 a ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date), TO_CHAR(u.start_date, 'Mon')
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date);
template:
SELECT
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date) AS start_month,
    TO_CHAR(u.start_date, ?s) AS month_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS employees_starting,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS assets_assigned,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_purchased_vs_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_remaining_at_start
FROM flag_18_sysuser u
LEFT JOIN flag_18 a ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date), TO_CHAR(u.start_date, ?s)
ORDER BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM u.start_date);

raw_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', a.warranty_expiration) AS expiry_month,
    COUNT(*) AS warranties_expiring,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_asset_cost,
    SUM(a.cost) AS total_replacement_cost_estimate,
    array_agg(DISTINCT a.model_category) AS categories_expiring
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', a.warranty_expiration)
ORDER BY expiry_month;
template:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, a.warranty_expiration) AS expiry_month,
    COUNT(*) AS warranties_expiring,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_asset_cost,
    SUM(a.cost) AS total_replacement_cost_estimate,
    array_agg(DISTINCT a.model_category) AS categories_expiring
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, a.warranty_expiration)
ORDER BY expiry_month;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN a.cost < 500 THEN 'Under $500'
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN 500 AND 1999 THEN '$500-$1,999'
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN 2000 AND 4999 THEN '$2,000-$4,999'
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN 5000 AND 9999 THEN '$5,000-$9,999'
        ELSE '$10,000+'
    END AS cost_tier,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(STDDEV(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS stddev_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    a.model_category
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY cost_tier, a.model_category
ORDER BY MIN(a.cost), a.model_category;
template:
SELECT
    CASE
        WHEN a.cost < ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        WHEN a.cost BETWEEN ?n AND ?n THEN ?s
        ELSE ?s
    END AS cost_tier,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS avg_warranty_days,
    ROUND(STDDEV(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - a.purchased_on)))) AS stddev_warranty_days,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    a.model_category
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY cost_tier, a.model_category
ORDER BY MIN(a.cost), a.model_category;

groupby_keys: CASE WHEN (a.cost < 500) THEN 'Under $500'::text WHEN ((a.cost >= 500) AND (a.cost <= 1999)) THEN '$500-$1,999'::text WHEN ((a.cost >= 2000) AND (a.cost <= 4999)) THEN '$2,000-$4,999'::text WHEN ((a.cost >= 5000) AND (a.cost <= 9999)) THEN '$5,000-$9,999'::text ELSE '$10,000+'::text END

raw_sql:
SELECT
    u.name,
    u.department,
    u.title,
    a.model_category,
    a.asset_tag,
    a.cost,
    u.start_date::date AS employee_start,
    a.purchased_on::date AS asset_purchased,
    a.warranty_expiration::date AS warranty_expires,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) / 30.0) AS warranty_months_from_start,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date))) AS days_purchased_before_start
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
WHERE a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months'
ORDER BY warranty_months_from_start ASC
LIMIT 25;
template:
SELECT
    u.name,
    u.department,
    u.title,
    a.model_category,
    a.asset_tag,
    a.cost,
    u.start_date::date AS employee_start,
    a.purchased_on::date AS asset_purchased,
    a.warranty_expiration::date AS warranty_expires,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)) / ?n) AS warranty_months_from_start,
    ROUND(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date))) AS days_purchased_before_start
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
WHERE a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL ?s
ORDER BY warranty_months_from_start ASC
LIMIT ?n;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('month', a.purchased_on) AS purchase_batch,
    DATE_TRUNC('month', u.start_date) AS employee_start_cohort,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS affected_employees,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS assets_at_risk,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_days_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assets_expiring_within_year1,
    SUM(a.cost) AS total_cost_at_risk
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
WHERE a.purchased_on BETWEEN '2023-05-01' AND '2023-08-31'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', a.purchased_on), DATE_TRUNC('month', u.start_date)
ORDER BY purchase_batch, employee_start_cohort;
template:
SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, a.purchased_on) AS purchase_batch,
    DATE_TRUNC(?s, u.start_date) AS employee_start_cohort,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS affected_employees,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS assets_at_risk,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_days_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS assets_expiring_within_year1,
    SUM(a.cost) AS total_cost_at_risk
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
WHERE a.purchased_on BETWEEN ?s AND ?s
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC(?s, a.purchased_on), DATE_TRUNC(?s, u.start_date)
ORDER BY purchase_batch, employee_start_cohort;

predicates: ((purchased_on >= '2023-05-01 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone) AND (purchased_on <= '2023-08-31 00:00:00'::timestamp without time zone))

raw_sql:
SELECT
    width_bucket(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)), -400, 30, 10) AS bucket_num,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_before_start,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN a.cost ELSE 0 END) AS cost_expiring_yr1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '24 months' THEN a.cost ELSE 0 END) AS cost_expiring_yr2
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;
template:
SELECT
    width_bucket(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)), -?n, ?n, ?n) AS bucket_num,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_before_start,
    COUNT(*) AS asset_count,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL ?s THEN a.cost ELSE ?n END) AS cost_expiring_yr1,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL ?s THEN a.cost ELSE ?n END) AS cost_expiring_yr2
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY bucket_num
ORDER BY bucket_num;

raw_sql:
SELECT
    u.department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS employees,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS total_assets,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_purchase_vs_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS assets_expiring_yr1,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL '12 months' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(a.asset_tag), 1) AS pct_expiring_yr1,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_asset_cost
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY u.department
ORDER BY avg_warranty_at_start_days DESC;
template:
SELECT
    u.department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT u.name) AS employees,
    COUNT(a.asset_tag) AS total_assets,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.purchased_on - u.start_date)))) AS avg_days_purchase_vs_start,
    ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(DAY FROM (a.warranty_expiration - u.start_date)))) AS avg_warranty_at_start_days,
    SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) AS assets_expiring_yr1,
    ROUND(?n * SUM(CASE WHEN a.warranty_expiration < u.start_date + INTERVAL ?s THEN ?n ELSE ?n END) / COUNT(a.asset_tag), ?n) AS pct_expiring_yr1,
    ROUND(AVG(a.cost)) AS avg_asset_cost
FROM flag_18 a
JOIN flag_18_sysuser u ON a.assigned_to = u.name
GROUP BY u.department
ORDER BY avg_warranty_at_start_days DESC;
